name: jira.issue.comment.add
description: Add a comment to a Jira Cloud issue. Plain-text comments are wrapped in Atlassian Document Format automatically.

configRefs.name: jira
configRefs.description: Generic config containing host (https://acme.atlassian.net), email, apiToken.

comment.description: Comment body. Plain text gets wrapped into ADF.

visibility.description: Optional visibility restriction, e.g. { type: 'role', value: 'Administrators' }.

comment.description: Jira's comment object (id, author, created, body, etc.).
